quotes.text: Your landing page has 7 CTAs. That's not a landing page, that's a panic attack.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: A/B testing is how you find out which of your two bad ideas is slightly less bad.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your hero section doesn't need a video background. Nobody is on your landing page for the cinematography.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing doesn't feel like marketing. It feels like someone telling you about something that will genuinely help you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The aim of marketing is to know and understand the customer so well the product or service fits them and sells itself.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Nobody reads ads. People read what interests them. Sometimes it's an ad.
quotes.author: Howard Gossage

quotes.text: Content marketing is just storytelling for people who are afraid to ask for the sale.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: SEO is the art of making your website slightly less terrible so Google tolerates showing it to people.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing is word of mouth. The second best is showing up consistently. The worst is buying followers.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Email marketing: because you need a way to annoy people who already told you they're not interested.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: A funnel is just a polite way of saying 'we lose most of our customers at each step.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Social media marketing is just shouting into the void and occasionally the void shouts back.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Brand awareness is what you measure when you can't measure anything useful.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is having a product people actually want to tell their friends about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Influencer marketing is just paying someone to pretend they like your product. The audience knows. They just don't care.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The difference between spam and marketing is whether the recipient asked for it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand isn't what you say it is. It's what Google says it is. And what Reddit says. And what that one angry customer says.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Content is king. Distribution is god. The graveyard is full of kings nobody visited.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build an email list was before you launched. The second best time is now. The worst time is never.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every marketing metric is a proxy for the one that actually matters: revenue. If you can't tie it to revenue, it's decoration.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Testimonials are the most underrated marketing asset. A real person saying 'this worked for me' beats any ad copy.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Cold email works when it's actually about them, not about you. Which means 99% of cold emails don't work.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best landing page converts at 5%. The average is 2%. Your landing page converts at 0.1% but you think it's 'fine.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Growth hacking is just marketing with a better haircut.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing advice is free. Ship something great and tell people about it. Everything else is optimization.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS landing page explains what you do in one sentence. If it takes a paragraph, rewrite it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing for an indie project is being useful. Be useful in forums, be useful on Twitter, be useful everywhere.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most underrated indie hacker skill is copywriting. If you can write a clear landing page, you can sell anything.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building an audience is before you need one.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your product description needs more than 3 sentences, simplify the product.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing ROI is a product people can't shut up about. Everything else is diminishing returns.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Selling is just helping people make decisions they already want to make.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Customers don't buy features. They buy outcomes. Stop selling what it does and start selling what it does for them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your landing page should do one thing: get the visitor to take one action. Everything else is a distraction.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your tech stack matters less than your distribution. A mediocre product with great distribution beats a great product with no distribution.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing is a product that sells itself. The second best is a customer who sells it for you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: SEO is a long game. If you want results today, run ads. If you want results in 6 months, write content.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your website isn't a brochure. It's a salesperson. If it can't close, rebuild it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building an email list is before you have a product. The second best is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Marketing is just storytelling for commerce. If you can't tell a good story, hire someone who can.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing campaigns are the ones people share voluntarily. Everything else is advertising.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your brand is what people say about you when you're not in the room. Make sure they're saying good things.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Content marketing takes 6 months to work. If you quit at 3 months, you've just wasted 3 months.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to grow is to make your current customers successful. Happy customers bring new customers.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every viral product started as a product that was useful to 10 people. Make those 10 people ecstatic.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain your product in 30 seconds, your marketing page can't explain it in 30 seconds either.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is to make your product so good that people can't shut up about it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing should tell a story. Not features. Not benefits. A story. People remember stories.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to start building a brand is before you have a product. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most powerful marketing asset is a customer who genuinely loves what you built.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to get traffic is to create something worth linking to. Everything else is paying for attention.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Marketing without data is driving with your eyes closed. Data without marketing is having your eyes open but going nowhere.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to grow your audience is before you need it. Audiences take time to build.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first 1000 email subscribers are the hardest to get. The next 9,000 are easier. Start collecting.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing is solving someone's problem publicly. Show, don't tell.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every SaaS needs a 'why this exists' page. Not a features page. A 'why' page.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your onboarding email sequence should feel like a helpful friend, not a desperate salesperson.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every indie hacker should learn one marketing skill: writing. Everything else is a bonus.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your landing page is your best salesperson. Make it work while you sleep.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best businesses are the ones where the customer doesn't know they're paying for marketing. The marketing IS the product.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your most valuable sales tool is a customer testimonial. Real words from real people beat any ad copy.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best sales channel is word of mouth. Build a product people can't shut up about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Content is king, but engagement is queen, and she runs the house.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best content is the content that helps someone solve a problem they've been struggling with.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best content is the content you'd want to read. Write for yourself first.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best content marketing doesn't feel like marketing. It feels like a helpful conversation.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your blog is your best salesperson. It works 24/7, never complains, and never asks for a raise.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best content is the content that's easy to consume. Short paragraphs. Clear headings. Simple language.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Content marketing is a marathon, not a sprint. The results compound over time.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to grow an audience is to give them value consistently. Not once. Consistently.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your newsletter is your most valuable marketing asset. Build it before you need it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best content is the content that teaches something. Not the content that sells something.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is to make something worth talking about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product is your best marketing tool. If it's good, people will talk about it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing should be as good as your product. If it's not, the product wins.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build trust is to be honest. Even when it hurts.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best marketing channel is the one you can sustain. Consistency beats brilliance.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to build a brand is before you need one. The second best time is now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing should tell a story. Not just sell a product.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best growth strategy is to make your product so good that marketing is optional.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing budget should be proportional to your product's quality. Great products need less marketing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build a personal brand is to be genuinely helpful. Not performative. Helpful.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your marketing should be as honest as your product. If it's not, you're building a house of cards.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to market a SaaS is to show it working. Not tell people about it. Show them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product's homepage should answer: what does it do, who is it for, why should I care? In that order.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to build an audience is to be consistently helpful. Not consistently promotional.
quotes.author: based
